'''Duunir''' was a celestial body<ref name="Socorro" /> located in the [[Duunir system/Legends|Duunir system]], a part of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Kibilini sector/Legends|Kibilini sector]].<ref name="EAOC" /> At some point by the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the interstellar [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] and [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] organization [[Black Bha'lir]] had established a facility on Duunir that was the largest of several isolated refuges for the creature also known as the [[Bha'lir|Black Bha'lir]]. The latter, a [[Forest/Legends|forest]] [[Diet/Legends|predator]] from the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Iyred]], had been adopted as a mascot of the criminal group, and consequently the Black Bha'lir founded the Duunir refuge as a charity. At that and other, similar facilities, small numbers of Black Bha'lir were raised despite the creature being officially listed as extinct in the wake of environmental degradation on Iyred.<ref name="Socorro" />

==Behind the scenes==
Duunir was mentioned in ''[[The Black Sands of Socorro]]'', a [[1997]] sourcebook authored by [[Patricia A. Jackson]] for use with [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="Socorro" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Duunir [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the celestial body, in grid square Q-17.<ref name="TEA" />
